flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Lutheran University rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California Lutheran University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.0k → $52.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California Lutheran University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.0k → $52.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California Lutheran University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
